codeReview.summary: The fix commit resolves both prior ui-index-migration blockers. DeductionService now threads CacheManager-backed `ts_by_id` maps through all live prompt-building call paths, so prompt_engine no longer rebuilds time-slot maps in production usage. `build_location_time_data()` also now accepts an optional centralized `char_by_id` name map, and the matrix page passes a CacheManager-derived mapping at the call site.

addressesFailureFrom: previous scrutiny round 1 blocking issues for ui-index-migration
summary: Pass: the prior blocking issues are resolved. Live prompt-engine paths now use centralized cache indexes, and the location×time matrix helper is wired to centralized character-name indexes from AppState cache.
